chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1919 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.11.2025 Mr. Muntazir Mehdi Leghari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Advocate General, Sindh. == The purpose of filing this petition stands served as the petitioner’s pension has been released. Learned counsel for the petitioner states at the bar that one month’s salary of the petitioner is still outstanding. Mr. Zaheeruddin Sahito, learned counsel, by filing Vakalatnama as well as statement on behalf of respondents No.3 to 5, undertakes to release the outstanding dues of the petitioner. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of in terms of the undertaking/statement made by learned counsel for H.D.A. The respondents shall also ensure release of pension to the petitioner on a monthly basis positively without fail. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
